query: extreme harsh chiaroscuro single light source dramatic black abstract shadow
message: anti_aesthetics/lighting: extreme chiaroscuro — single-source dramatic, abstract black/shadow play, deep contrast pushed to graphic abstraction

response.objective_caption: A black and white photograph showing broad regions of light and dark. A bright, curved shape sits near the left edge, adjacent to darker areas that extend toward the center. The remainder of the frame consists of lighter gray tones. The boundaries between tonal regions are gradual, and no specific objects or figures are visible.
response.anti_aesthetic_caption: An abstract black and white photograph rendered with intentional soft-focus blur and visible analog film grain. A bright, curved form emerges from deep shadow on the left, dissolving into gradual tonal gradations toward the right. The image abandons representational clarity, presenting indistinct shapes that emphasize texture and atmospheric mood over identifiable content.
